history.summary: Worker task-def env wired with SENDBLUE/SES/ARTIFACTS.
SES IaC option A; basics-runtime-outbound + SNS + IAM.
send_email; cycle-1 header-injection blockers fixed; live SES e2e to external mailbox.
send_sms; live Sendblue DELIVERED; 3 bugs fixed (from_number, snake_case, 200-with-error).
Output dispatcher + run-completion wiring; 10 unit tests cover plan verify a/b/c/d.

Live integrated smoke against production via real chat run. attach_artifact + send_email (with attachment) + send_sms all completed; 3 output_dispatched rows landed in cloud_activity; signed URL fetched 200 with matching JSON body. Run 4 (31e06d13-…) was the green run after 3 prior runs caught 3 real bugs that unit tests missed (missing worker IAM s3:PutObject; opencode-plugin not injecting quotaStore; PgQuotaStore sharing aggressively-idle-timed pg connection). Screenshot subtest captured the PNG but the model stalled echoing the base64 back through a tool param — known opencode image-handling bottleneck; the screenshot tool's own S3 persistence is unaffected.

operatorDecisions.decision: No git push between loop iterations
Run live e2e for every feature; never skip
Test on production directly (not local); use Supabase MCP to mint workspace api keys for future automation
